channel.title: dotnet/EntityFramework.Docs Pull Requests
channel.description: Pull Requests from https://github.com/dotnet/EntityFramework.Docs, generated by https://github.com/meziantou/IssuesToRss/

item.title: PR: Update value-conversions.md - @mrlife
item.description: False values are listed first in most of the document but not all places. The first edit also fixes implied mapping of false to "Y" and true to "N".

item.title: PR: Added custom foreign keys for many to many relationships - @bjcull
item.description:
Hi Team,

I ran into this problem today, and thought it would be a great addition to the docs. Let me know if you have feedback.

Cheers, Ben.

item.title: PR: Remove "ConnectRetryCount", no longer needed due to added overload of SqlConnection.Open being used. - @ErikEJ
item.description:
Standardize dummy connection strings

fixes #2703

item.title: PR: Update index.md - @OOberoi
item.description: Just a handful of missing punctuation marks.

item.title: PR: Update efficient-querying.md - @gavinroderick
item.description: Looks like one of the code blocks of SQL is annotated as C#. Have updated this section

item.title: PR: Add a note on querying shared columns - @joakimriedel
item.description:
From https://github.com/dotnet/efcore/issues/25210, suggestion to add a note in the section on shared columns that some providers do not filter results by discriminator when casting a base entity to a child entity.

ping @AndriySvyryd

item.title: PR: Update relationships.md - @OOberoi
item.description: Minor corrections with missing punctuation marks.

item.title: PR: Fix word order typo - @bartoszluka
item.description: Addresses issue I created

item.title: PR: Removed extra parenthesis - @JohnMHigginsPMC
item.description: There was an extra left parenthesis with no matching right one, so I removed it.

item.title: PR: Update for added support for EF Core 5 - @ErikEJ
PR: Update entity-entries.md - @JonasSamuelsson
item.description: Fixed spelling mistake

item.title: PR: New overload: implementing IModelCacheKeyFactory - @joelmandell
item.description: EF Core 6, new overload example for "Design-time DbContext creation"-support, when implementing IModelCacheKeyFactory.

item.title: PR: Update comparision - @ErikEJ
item.description: fixes #3296

item.title: PR: Create platform and permissions neutral path for blog - @JeremyLikness
item.description: Used local folder for consistency.

item.title: PR: Fix typo - @roji
item.description: Fixes #3291

item.title: PR: OS independent connection string path - @Rick-Anderson
item.description: Fixes #3285

item.title: PR: Added an extensions entry for EntityFrameworkCore.Projectables - @koenbeuk
item.description:
EntityFrameworkCore.Projectables enables a way to use normal properties and methods within your linq query while having it still generate proper sql. Similar to Expressionify, it uses a code generator to create companion expressions of any property/method that is marked with an attribute. I've been using this technique for a while now and have recently published this library as a generic implementation. It has quite a few differences from Expressionify as it first allows Expanding on much more than just extension methods as well as it integrates with EFCore and actually improves performance for query compilation (currently exposed in the Benchmark but I'll add a blog post on this topic soon too).

It would be great if this can be listed on the Extensions page docs. If there are concerns that this project is still in 'preview' (currently v0.4.0). I expect a proper release within the next couple of days.

item.title: PR: Update wpf.md - @JeremyLikness
item.description: Clarify where to paste the code.

item.title: PR: Make Microsoft docs link relative - @smitpatel
PR: Spelling and grammar fixes - @gieseanw
item.description: This PR primarily seeks to fix the "BlogWithMultiplePost" typo. I made a few other changes to give the PR more weight.

item.title: PR: Update Jet provider to 3.1 and .NET Core support - @ErikEJ
PR: Update keyless-entity-types.md: Note about ToView() - @HSchwichtenberg
item.description: I think the sentence "ToView assumes that the object already exists in the database and it won't be created by migrations." is old / misleading.

item.title: PR: Add perf section on reducing runtime overhead - @roji
PR: Update the plan for EF Core 6.0 - @ajcvickers
PR: IDbContextFactory<TContext> Instead - @wuyuansushen
item.description: IDbContextFactory is used in EF or early version of EF Core. Please use IDesignTimeDbContextFactory Interface to instead of it. ref

item.title: PR: Add config logging - @Rick-Anderson
item.description:
~Fixes~ Partially addresses #1331 Fixes #3208

Internal review URL

The config logging can be used for more than dev. Should I add a note that it can be used in test and production when a problem cannot be reproduced in a dev environment. Setting "Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Database.Command": to "Information" in production can have negative performance impacts.

Simple Logging

https://microsoft-ce-csi.acrolinx.cloud/htmldata/en/rules/help/avoid_simply.html Avoid "simple/simply" It's generally a good idea to avoid describing instructions with simple or simply as the reader might not find it so simple.

Can I change simple to basic?

Entity Framework Core (EF Core) simple logging can be used to easily obtain logs whil

Ditto for easily

item.title: PR: Add EntityFrameworkCore.VisualBasic - @bricelam
item.description: Thanks @lorcQc!

item.title: PR: Correct blog/post confusion - @roji
item.description: Fixes #3231
